zh.lifeSummary: 當Anselm De Garlende於1069年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-巴格時，他的父親William of Garlande11066歲，母親Havoise de Crespy22歲。他於大約1094年與Beatrice de Montlhery在法國瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1117年在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯洛福吉-易維林斯享年48歲，埋葬在法國艾-吉洛易勒 普易斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anselm De Garlende于1069年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯豪-德-巴格时，他的父亲William of Garlande11066岁，母亲Havoise de Crespy22岁。他于大约1094年与Beatrice de Montlhery在法国瑟-吉瓦蒙特爾賀利结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1117年在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯洛福吉-易維林斯享年48岁，埋葬在法国艾-吉洛易勒 普易斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Anselm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, a compound of ans ‘divinity’ + helm ‘helmet’. It was brought from Italy to England by St Anselm , who was Archbishop of Canterbury in the late 11th and early 12th centuries, and is regarded as one of the Doctors of the Church. The name is now relatively infrequent and used mainly by Roman Catholics.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Deborah
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘bee’ in Hebrew), borne by the nurse of Rebecca (Genesis 35:8) and by a woman judge and prophet (Judges 4–5) who led the Israelites to victory over the Canaanites. It has always been popular as a Jewish name. It was in use among Christians by the mid 16th century and was taken up by the Puritans in the 17th century, in part because the bee was a symbol of industriousness. Since then it has enjoyed enormous popularity, peaking in the 1960s. Among other famous bearers is the actress  Deborah Kerr  (  1921–2007 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Anselm De Garlende was born in 1069, in Bagneux, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, his father, William of Garlande, was 11066 and his mother, Havoise de Crespy, was 22. He married Beatrice de Montlhery about 1094, in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1117, in Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Le Puiset, Eure-et-Loir, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anselm De Garlende est né en 1069, à Bagneux, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, France, son père, William of Garlande, avait 11066 ans et sa mère, Havoise de Crespy, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice de Montlhery environ 1094, à Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1117, à Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Le Puiset, Eure-et-Loir, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anselm De Garlende 1069 in Bagneux, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater William of Garlande 11066 und seine Mutter Havoise de Crespy 22. Er hat um 1094 in Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Frankreich Beatrice de Montlhery geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1117 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich und wurde in Le Puiset, Eure-et-Loir, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anselm De Garlende è nato il nel 1069 nel Bagneux, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, William of Garlande, aveva 11066 anni e il suo madre, Havoise de Crespy, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice de Montlhery circa 1094, nel Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1117, nel Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Le Puiset, Eure-et-Loir, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Anselm De Garlendeが1069年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスハウトス-デ-セアインバグネウックスで生まれた時，父William of Garlandeは11066歳，母Havoise de Crespyは22歳であった。約1094年にフランスセアイネ-エト-オイゼモントルheリーでBeatrice de Montlheryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1117年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスロチェフォート-エン-イベラインスで48歳で死去し，フランスエウレ-エト-ロイルル プウイセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anselm De Garlende(이)가 1069년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 하츠-데-세이인 바그니우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William of Garlande(은)는 11066세였고, 그의 어머니 Havoise de Crespy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1094년 프랑스 세이인-트-이스 몽he리에서 Beatrice de Montlhery(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1117년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 록헤포트--이벨라이네스에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 우레-트-로이르 일 푸이즈트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anselm De Garlende nasceu em 1069, em Bagneux, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, William of Garlande, tinha 11066 anos e sua mãe, Havoise de Crespy, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice de Montlhery aproximadamente 1094, em Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1117, em Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Le Puiset, Eure-et-Loir, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anselm De Garlende родился в 1069 г. в местности багнеукс, хауц-де-син, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени William of Garlande было 11066 лет, а матери, которую звали Havoise de Crespy, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice de Montlhery около 1094 г. в местности монтлхeри, сине-ет-оис, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1117 г. в местности рошефорт-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности л пуисет, эуре-ет-лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anselm De Garlende nació en 1069, en Bagneux, Hauts-de-Seine, Île-de-France, Francia, su papá, William of Garlande, tenía 11066 años y su mamá, Havoise de Crespy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Beatrice de Montlhery aproximadamente 1094, en Montlhéry, Seine-et-Oise, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1117, en Rochefort-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Le Puiset, Eure-et-Loir, Francia.
